# Autodesk Fusion LAP SDK — LLM Reference Guide

Compressed API reference for the Autodesk Fusion Python SDK.
Use these .lap files to write Autodesk Fusion scripts, add-ins, and automations.

## Quick Start

Fetch the base reference (always start here, ~20K tokens):
https://halletj.github.io/fusion-lap-sdk/lap/fusion-base.lap

This contains the object navigation graph, common gotchas, and core types
(Application, Point3D, Vector3D, ValueInput, etc.).

## Domain Files

Fetch the relevant domain file based on the task:

- Sketches, curves, constraints, profiles:
  https://halletj.github.io/fusion-lap-sdk/lap/fusion-sketch.lap

- Extrude, revolve, loft, sweep, fillet, chamfer, etc.:
  https://halletj.github.io/fusion-lap-sdk/lap/fusion-features.lap

- BRep bodies, faces, edges, mesh, T-spline:
  https://halletj.github.io/fusion-lap-sdk/lap/fusion-bodies.lap

- Components, joints, occurrences, assembly:
  https://halletj.github.io/fusion-lap-sdk/lap/fusion-assembly.lap

- CAM setup, toolpaths, operations:
  https://halletj.github.io/fusion-lap-sdk/lap/fusion-cam.lap

- Drawing views, dimensions, annotations:
  https://halletj.github.io/fusion-lap-sdk/lap/fusion-drawing.lap

- Commands, palettes, toolbars, UI events:
  https://halletj.github.io/fusion-lap-sdk/lap/fusion-ui.lap

## Rules for Autodesk Fusion Scripts

- Always import: import adsk.core, adsk.fusion, adsk.cam
- Units are always centimeters internally, regardless of UI display settings
- Check return values for None — operations fail silently
- Use the [graph] section in fusion-base.lap to navigate the Autodesk Fusion object model
- Input objects must be fully configured before calling .add()
- Sketch profiles are only available after geometry is fully closed
- Collections are 0-indexed, use .item(i) or [i]

## Format

Files use .lap format: classes with ":" for inheritance, properties without parens,
methods with parens, *collection<T> for collection classes. The format is plain text
and self-describing.

## Source

Repository: https://github.com/halletj/fusion-lap-sdk
Generated from Autodesk Fusion Python API stubs + FusionAPIReference HTML docs.
